hero.title: Tailored digital experiences.
hero.description: Web development, design and intelligent solutions designed for performance, sustainability and privacy. A modern, local and human approach.

identity.text: Origin Studio is an agency created in Switzerland by three complementary developers. We design elegant, fast and secure digital solutions, with human support from start to finish.

quality.title: Quality & Sustainability
quality.description: Clear, scalable code designed to last.

finalCTA.title: Tell us about your project. We take the time to talk, even if it's just an idea.

about.title: About Origin Studio
about.subtitle: Three friends, three expertises, one common vision
about.intro: Passionate about the vast universe of the web, we have united our complementary skills to create Origin Studio, an agency specialized in the creation, development and maintenance of websites and web applications.

mission.title: At the origin of your success
mission.description: At Origin, we bring together design, technology, and vision to create digital projects that are both solid and sustainable. Our mission: turning your ideas into solutions that grow with you.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Three bachelors in web technology, three complementary expertises:

commercial.description: Specialized in understanding customer needs and transforming business requirements into adapted technical solutions.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Principles that guide each of our decisions:

responsibleHosting.title: Responsible Hosting
responsibleHosting.description: All our projects are hosted in Switzerland with environmentally friendly infrastructures and compliant with the highest security standards.

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.description: We commit to our clients over the long term, providing ongoing support and continuous evolution of their digital solutions.
